values.content: =Analyze these pages for internal link opportunities and FAQ additions: {{ JSON.stringify($json) }}

parameters.subject: =Tax4Us Weekly Content Refresh Report - {{ $('Prepare Report').item.json.date }}
parameters.message:
=

Tax4Us Weekly Content Refresh Report

Date: {{ $('Prepare Report').item.json.date }}

Pages Analyzed: {{ $('Prepare Report').item.json.total_pages_analyzed }} ({{ $('Prepare Report').item.json.hebrew_pages }} Hebrew, {{ $('Prepare Report').item.json.english_pages }} English)

Total Suggestions: {{ $('Prepare Report').item.json.total_suggestions }}

  • Internal Links: {{ $('Prepare Report').item.json.link_suggestions }}
  • FAQ Additions: {{ $('Prepare Report').item.json.faq_suggestions }}

Detailed Suggestions:

{{ $('Prepare Report').item.json.suggestions.map(suggestion => { return `

Page: ${suggestion.slug}

` + (suggestion.suggested_links ? `

Link Suggestions:

    ${suggestion.suggested_links.map(link => `
  • "${link.anchor}" → ${link.to_slug}
    • `).join('')}
` : '') + (suggestion.faq_additions ? `

FAQ Suggestions:

    ${suggestion.faq_additions.map(faq => `
  • Q: ${faq.q}
    A: ${faq.a_html}
    • `).join('')}
` : ''); }).join('') }}

Last Modified: {{ $('Prepare Report').item.json.last_modified }}

This report is generated automatically every Monday at 7:30 AM Chicago time.

Best regards,
Tax4Us Content System
